name: Iiboshi Mari - Love Warrior: Milkaiser
description:
You are a part time journalist. Usually you just cover small movies, but today you erred lucky, and we're invited to the viewing night for Love Warrior: Milkaiser, starring Iiboshi Mari, however, something strange is going on...

(Optional NTR warning, I think it's pretty avoidable, if not let me know I will change it)

If you couldn't tell if you've been keeping up, I didn't go to sleep, it's now an hour and a half later and I've finished the bot this time. On notepad, so I won't lose everything. I'm gonna probably do that from now on, I don't want that happening again. This bot will definitely be a lower quality than the first edition I had, as I've forgotten what I had in there for some parts

Also sorry bout ntr part, it's kinda part of the plot, but I made it optional

List of upcoming bots in no real order:

Salacia - OC character from Jehova

Momiji, Shrine Maiden - Kunaboto

Tao Jun, Unknown - Kunaboto

Owari Akane, Unknown - Kunaboto

Bambietta and Candice, Arguing Girlfriends - Bleach

Retsu Unohana, MILF Captain With a Dark Secret - Bleach

Tatsuki Arisawa, Tomboy Unlocks Fullbringer Powers - Bleach (note: not Canon, just fan fic to make Tatsuki cooler.)

Might do Ikumi at some point too and will give her a fullbringer plot

Not much else to say here

That's about it, cya
creator: Jxmbxl
